transcript: I need to get pretty hi-tech here pretty quick.
Ahhh! [pitch-down] Can you tell me where the XLR reversers are—what aisle they’re in?
What aisle are they in?! [delay, pitch-down] I was lookin’ for a Squawkbox.
I’m adjustin’ some things. What I need… [exaggerated throat-clearing] is a Reverser.
I’m sorry, you need a what?
Okay, I—I gotta go. Is there anything I can seriously help you with?
Uh, what, uh, terms do you have?
Uh, terms are net 30, for a good client like you. Wha—what’s the shipping address and I’ll just get it right away—
Well, let’s work it out! Tell you what, I gotta give you three addresses, okay? And here’s why: I’ve got three addresses that I use. I travel.
This—this is very interesting, but I’m sorry, I’ve gotta go. I got a real customer here. Thank—
I’ve got a real need, here!
